title: BLOCK 4 FINAL: Speed mastery
description: Block 4 final exam — 55 WPM on a real-world mixed-content paragraph
text: By the end of Q2 2026, the team had shipped 12 features, closed 47 tickets, and gained 8,500 new users (+34% MoM). Average response time dropped to 180 ms. CEO David Lopez wrote: "Outstanding work, everyone. Next quarter: aim for 95% retention."
